series_metadata.series_title: Cassette Tapes/Digital Recordings of Commission/Board Meetings
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of cassette tapes or digital recordings of hearings before the Commission or Board.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Tapes or recordings are to be retained on-site for three years after the disciplinary file is closed at the administrative level or upon the expiration of appeals, whichever is later. Then, the tapes or recordings are sent to the State Archives for their retention or destruction., Electronic: Other
